name: Apotex Inc.
lede: Apotex runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Bengaluru, covering gbs and R&D, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Apotex office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Apotex Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Apotex runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Bengaluru), covering gbs and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Deputy General Manager Human Resources and Admin

about.description: Apotex's India footprint covers Mumbai and Bengaluru, spanning gbs and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 27 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Apotex operate in India?
faq.a: Apotex operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Apotex have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Apotex's India GCC footprint spans Mumbai and Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Apotex run in India?
faq.a: Apotex runs gbs and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Apotex's India GCCs?
faq.a: Apotex's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Apotex's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 27 leaders at Apotex's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
